content_to_dict.description: Dictionary mapping canonical compound IDs to rich assay extraction objects.

content_to_multi_assay_dict.description: Nested dictionary mapping requested assay names to canonical compound-ID/rich extraction-object dictionaries.

identify_assay_visual_review_requests.description: Dictionary mapping assay names to visual-review request arrays. Each request should include compound_id, ocr_value, confidence, reason, and optional context.

verify_assay_match_assignments.description: Dictionary mapping compound IDs to independent assay-assignment verification objects with compatible_current, best_requested_assay, confidence, and reason.

verify_compound_id_assignments.description: Dictionary mapping current compound IDs to independent compound-ID verification objects with valid_current_id, canonical_compound_id, confidence, and reason.

verify_assay_value_assignments.description: Dictionary mapping compound IDs to independent assay-value verification objects with valid_assay_value, corrected_value, corrected_unit, confidence, and reason.

route_assays_for_content.description: Assay routing decision for one OCR page or table-safe chunk. The assays object must contain every requested assay name with extract, confidence, and reason.

detect_assay_pages.description: OCR/LLM assay-page detection. Every provided page must have exactly one decision object; assay_pages are derived from decisions where has_assay_data=true.

reconcile_detected_assay_names.description: Verifier result for selecting the assay-name candidates that should enter extraction, with conservative handling of uncertainty.

reconcile_assay_values_with_visual_repor.description: Nested dictionary mapping assay names to final compound-ID/rich assay objects after high-confidence visual corrections.

get_compound_id_from_description.description: JSON object containing the final normalized compound ID or the string None, with mandatory confidence and reason fields.

resolve_compound_id_alias.description: JSON object containing the allowlist-resolved canonical compound ID or the string None, with mandatory confidence and reason fields.
